operationLogs.comments: Sprayed the food court perimeter and external garbage bins. High activity of flies noted in rear zone.
operationLogs.clientComments: Very satisfied with the quick response and detailed inspection.
operationLogs.clientSignature: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100" height="40"><path d="M10,25 Q30,5 50,25 T90,25" fill="none" stroke="red" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

operationLogs.comments: Subterranean termite pre-treatment done in basement expansion joint. Injected Termidor barrier.
operationLogs.clientComments: Works done according to SOW. Supervisor was very professional.
operationLogs.clientSignature: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100" height="40"><path d="M15,10 C20,35 40,35 45,15 S60,5 85,30" fill="none" stroke="red" stroke-width="2"/></svg>

operationLogs.comments: Cleaned roof gutters and installed bird spikes on main entry canopy. Completed general crawl space spraying.
operationLogs.clientComments: Good work, hope the spikes will keep the pigeons away.
operationLogs.clientSignature: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100" height="40"><path d="M10,20 L30,30 L50,10 L70,30 L90,20" fill="none" stroke="red" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
